findings.evidence: `rg` shows only `mem_blockCylinder`, `measurableSet_blockCylinder`, and indicator/integrability lemmas in `Cylinder.lean`; existing consumers use `blockLaw μ X k (Set.univ.pi B)` in `ConditionallyIID.lean:130` and `CommonEnding.lean:43`, while `Basic.lean:84` exposes `blockLaw_apply` as a map law.
findings.fix: Add a characteristic lemma such as `blockCylinder_eq_preimage_univ_pi` and a measure-level `blockLaw_apply_univ_pi`/`blockLaw_blockCylinder` with the needed measurability hypotheses, so consumers can bridge cylinder indicators to the existing rectangle factorization without unfolding definitions.
findings.issue: `blockCylinder` has membership/measurability lemmas but no public lemma identifying it with the preimage of `Set.univ.pi C`, or evaluating `blockLaw μ X k (Set.univ.pi C)` as `μ (blockCylinder X k C)`.

summary: The new surface is mostly narrow, but the cylinder API is not connected to the existing finite-dimensional law/rectangle interface that the de Finetti endpoint already uses.
